catalyst.event: NetEase Q1 2026 earnings release — key read on Marvel Rivals monetization sustainability (post-launch quarter 5), Where Winds Meet PC->mobile transition revenue recognition, and Naraka/Identity V grossing trajectory; management commentary on 2026 pipeline (Destiny: Rising, Ananta) and operating margin guidance after FY2025 GM compression
catalyst.date_or_window: 2026-05-21 (expected Q1 2026 earnings; NetEase historically reports late May for Q1)
catalyst.source: NetEase IR calendar; historical Q1 release pattern (Q1 2025 released 2025-05-22)

rightIf_conditions: Q1 2026 online game revenue YoY ≤ +9% (vs consensus +12-13%)
Marvel Rivals Q1 2026 grossing (per Sensor Tower/AppMagic) down ≥25% vs Q1 2025 average
Sell-side cuts 2026 EPS by ≥5% within 2 weeks of print
wrongIf_conditions: Q1 2026 online game revenue YoY ≥ +13% AND GM ≥ 62%
Marvel Rivals Q1 2026 grossing flat or up YoY per third-party trackers
Management announces Destiny: Rising hard launch date in 2026 with Apple/Google co-marketing
USD 5B buyback executed at >USD 1B/quarter pace, providing structural bid
what_changes_our_mind: Q1 2026 earnings (2026-05-21) prints online game revenue YoY ≥ +13% AND gross margin ≥ 62% AND management guides Destiny: Rising launch date within 2026 — that combination would invalidate the decay thesis and force us to consensus.
variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes Marvel Rivals + 2026 pipeline sustains +12% growth and HKD 200+ → We believe Q1/Q2 2026 prints expose decay + GM mix shift, triggering 12-18% de-rate → Mechanism is consensus EPS cut after Q1 2026 earnings on 2026-05-21.
time_to_resolution: 16 days to Q1 2026 print; full thesis resolution by Q2 2026 (August 2026)

expected_pnl_asymmetry.upside_if_right: +15% short return (HK shares -12 to -18% from ~HKD 175 to HKD 145-155 range)
expected_pnl_asymmetry.downside_if_wrong: -8% (squeeze to HKD 190 if beat-and-raise, capped by valuation reality post-bounce)

quantification.metric_target: Q1 2026 online game revenue YoY growth and gross margin
quantification.current_value: FY24 online games +6.5% YoY; GM 62.5%; Q4 2025 GM ~61.8% (est.)
quantification.predicted_value: Q1 2026 online games +7-9% YoY (vs consensus +12-13%); GM 60.5-61.2% (vs consensus 62%+)
quantification.predicted_horizon: Q1 2026 print 2026-05-21; thesis resolution by Q2 2026 print (August 2026)
